questions.scenario: A script may overwrite export objects under the same names. What should the team decide before production?

options.text: Whether immutable names, versioning, or another recovery protection is required.
Whether object storage should replace checkout transactions.
Whether all objects should be public.
Whether the bucket name should be hidden from logs.

questions.explanation: Overwrite behavior needs a recovery plan before bad bytes replace good bytes.

questions.scenario: Temporary exports should disappear after 30 days, but receipts must be kept much longer. What design smell should the team avoid?

options.text: One careless lifecycle rule that treats both data types the same.
Using a database to record receipt metadata.

questions.explanation: Lifecycle policy should match data purpose and retention needs.

questions.scenario: Which choices can help recover from object overwrite or deletion?

options.text: Soft delete or retention controls where configured.

questions.explanation: Recovery and safe deletion need deliberate object protection choices.
